description_long: This is a countertop electric stand mixer with a glossy purple finish and a robust, rounded chassis. The main body is made of metal or high-strength plastic, featuring a prominent head that houses the motor and a side-mounted control panel. Attached to the base is a large, transparent mixing bowl made of glass or clear plastic, with a wire whisk attachment visible inside. The mixer has a tilting head mechanism, allowing the bowl and whisk to be easily accessed or removed. Ventilation slots and subtle metallic accents are present on the body, and the overall design is sleek and modern. The object is compact, with no visible wheels, and is intended for stationary use on flat surfaces.
description: A glossy purple stand mixer with a transparent mixing bowl and wire whisk, featuring a rounded, modern design and metallic accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the mixer, including the bowl, whisk, and control panel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular head, bowl opening, and the alignment of the whisk inside the bowl.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the bowl and attachment mechanism.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, curved back of the chassis and ventilation slots.
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with a rounded, streamlined form and integrated base
